name: Erica Bordador
subject: The honest truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
|
|
---
| Peter, here's the honest truth:

**If everyone reading this email right now donated $1, we 'd cross the 130,000-donor threshold _instantly_.**

That means we'd fulfill one of the HUGE requirements we need to send Kirsten to the next debate.

You can truly make the difference. **How about it?**
---
| _If you 've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $1](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjE5ODE5MDUS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTI2Mzk0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| Time's running out to get this done. And since you haven't made a donation to our campaign yet, you're one of the people we really need to see step up right now.

I'm not exaggerating when I say _every_ person counts.

Thanks for all you do,

Erica

Erica Bordador
Deputy National Finance Director
Gillibrand 2020
---
| | [MAKE A DONATION](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjE5ODE5MDUS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTI2Mzk0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

|

|

name: Zach Fang, Organizing Director
subject: Make or break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
This is going to be crucial to our success as a campaign.

| | | |
---
| Hey Yang Gang --
---
| My name is Zach Fang and I’m the Organizing Director here at Yang2020. We’re working hard here in Iowa, which is just 166 days away from voting. But to win, we have to fully fund our program.

We need $49,081 by midnight tonight so that we can give the go-ahead to hire more organizers and rent more offices across the state. This is going to be crucial to our success as a campaign. So much is riding on the next month, and it could make or break our movement.

**We’ve got the big, bold ideas to move our economy forward and put humanity first -- let’s show everyone this team is willing to fight for it.**
---
| Make a contribution of this week’s average donation of $32.03 or whatever you can now to supercharge our Iowa organizing program and build the future we need:
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: My Prediction – The Democrat Nominee for President Will Be…
body:
My Prediction - The Democrat Nominee for President Will Be... No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [My Prediction - The Democrat Nominee for President Will Be...](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-j/)
So who's going to be Donald Trump's Democratic rival for the presidency this time around? The truth is, no one knows for sure. And Joe Biden has been the leader of the Democrat pack since even before he officially threw his hat into the ring back in April. But I think it's likely to be someone other than Joe. Here's my analysis.

Click the link below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [A "Beautiful" Letter](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-d/)
President Trump announced a few days ago that he'd received another letter from North Korea's dictator Kim Jong Un. Not only was it a letter, but it was a "beautiful" letter.

Click the link below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [El Paso and Dayton](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-u/)
Well, it's happened again. Twice. Crazy/evil men with guns, killing and wounding innocent people, just for the hell of it. This time in El Paso, Texas. And just up the road from our community, in Dayton.

Click the link below to read my thoughts in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Kowtowing to China](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-n/)
More and more, China is having influence over a particular sector of our American entertainment industry. Why you ask? I'm on the blog today talking about it.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdluikjl-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The progress we've made together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY INSLEE FOR AMERICA
body:
| Friend, As a close ally in a noble cause, I want to share a tough decision with you: I know you agree that our mission to defeat climate change must continue to be central to our national discussion -- and must be the top priority for our next president. **But I've concluded that my role in that effort will not be as a candidate to be the next president of the United States.** On Monday, our campaign hit one of two critical DNC thresholds to qualify for the next debate -- 130,000 grassroots donors. Reaching that challenging milestone proves the strong support that defeating climate change has amongst the grassroots of our party. However, at the same time we reached this threshold, it became clear that we would not meet the DNC's polling threshold, thus we would not have been invited to the fall debates. As a result, I don't believe we can compete for the attention and exposure needed to have a reasonable shot at the nomination. As disappointing as this is, it is only right to recognize what we have accomplished and how far we have come together. As a governor, I came into this race with zero federal dollars, a small state-based email list, and limited name recognition, yet together we hit a target that half of the field has not hit -- the DNC's grassroots supporter metric. The tremendous grassroots outpouring of 130,000 individual donors, from every state in the nation, is a testament to the movement that we've built together. Not only did we hit this high bar set by the DNC, but more importantly, together, we changed and shaped the entire national dialogue around climate change. In recent presidential cycles, climate change got little attention from the candidates, the DNC, or the media. We vowed to change that in a big way and succeeded. Many of the campaigns started with little attention to climate, but since our campaign began, we've seen almost every serious candidate put out a climate plan; we've seen climate come up in both debates; and we now have two networks hosting nationally-televised climate forums in September. Most importantly, we have introduced a detailed and comprehensive policy blueprint for bold climate action and transformation to a clean energy economy. We will fight to ensure this gold standard of climate action is adopted and executed by our party and our next president. **What we accomplished together is a testament to the power of a small group of people of strong conviction committed to making a big difference. I am confident our work will resonate throughout the remaining months of the campaign.** Before I decided to run, Trudi and I -- my wife of nearly 47 years -- decided in our final days we wanted to be able to tell our three grandchildren, Brody, Zoe, and Chase, that we had done everything in our power to defeat this crisis. It is because of you and hundreds of thousands of others in this movement that we can now say that we have enjoyed one of life's greatest gifts -- to make a difference on a big issue. After more than two decades in this fight against climate change, today I am more hopeful than ever that we can achieve a critical mass to solve this crisis, because of the incredible grassroots movement we're building together. As we turn to the future, I will have more to say about what comes next for me in the days ahead. I can assure you that I will continue to lead, to demand bold action, and to do everything in my power to ensure the fight to defeat climate change stays at the top of the national agenda. But for now, I want to once again thank everyone who helped in this effort. We have so much to be proud of. Make no mistake, we also have a lot more work to do. **So early to bed, early to rise, work like hell, and organize. Together we will continue the fight to defeat the climate crisis.** Very truly yours, Jay P.S. Trudi and I love you.
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=7938%2E868730%2EpY6NdI). Contributions or gifts to Inslee for America are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY INSLEE FOR AMERICA

| | | | | Have you taken our August Issues Survey yet? We need 280 more responses before midnight tonight. John Hickenlooper is Democrats' BEST chance to flip this seat and take back the Senate.
Hick, the former Governor of Colorado and geologist by training, achieved near universal healthcare access AND universal background checks during his tenure as governor.
**We need Hick 's pragmatic, policy-based leadership in the Senate now more than ever before.**
[**This is too important to pass up: Help us power Hick 's grassroots campaign with a $10 contribution now! >>**](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hickannouncesplit_hic?refcode=314_EM_FR_190822_HickAnnounce1_U3_X1&amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+This+is+too+important+to+pass+up+Help+us&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190822_HickAnnounce1_U3_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190822_HickAnnounce1_U3_X1")

In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I'm running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
You read that right. Today, I'm launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Colorado--and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171c/691c9bd/6e94b99a/11a442d2/2893023439/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-launch?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

You read that right. Today, I'm launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Colorado--and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.

[**_Let me tell you more about this decision --then will you chip in to help build this campaign from the ground up?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-launch?refcode=em_fr_20190822_JH_20190822-fr-JH-senlaunch1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-launch?refcode=em_fr_20190822_JH_20190822-fr-JH-senlaunch1-actives_actives_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=") For the last six months, I've listened to people from all over the country talk about their hopes, dreams and concerns for our future. Again and again I heard about health care, I heard about jobs. I heard about the same issues from my friends and neighbors here at home. But I also heard:

**" What about the Senate?"**

It's a great question. Here in Colorado, we're a model for the nation on expanding access to health care, combating gun violence and actually taking action on climate change--**yet we 're represented in Washington by a senator who votes 99% of the time with Donald Trump and goes along with Mitch McConnell's obstruction and partisan political games.**

**Cory Gardner 's votes and priorities are out of step with Colorado.** We expanded health care to nearly 400,000 Coloradans--no thanks to Gardner, who's voted to undermine our progress and gut protections for pre-existing conditions. We enacted universal background checks and stood up to the NRA--meanwhile, Gardner has benefited from _nearly $4 million from the NRA_.

**And we _definitely_ did not give the majority of our votes in 2016--let alone 99% of them--to Donald Trump.**

We can do a lot better. And we _must_. My conversations this year reinforced that the next occupant of the White House won't get anything done if Mitch McConnell is still leading the Senate and if people like Cory Gardner never push back.

**At a moment like this, we can't just throw up our hands and walk away. I'm running to change the way Washington works as our next U.S. Senator.**

The numbers are on our side. Gardner is the most vulnerable Republican incumbent in the whole country--and his team knows it. The other side is going to throw everything they've got at us, and Gardner's special-interest friends, including the NRA, will spend big to keep this seat.

Meanwhile, I'm refusing all corporate PAC money on this campaign. **With this grassroots team on my side, I believe we can take them on --and win.**

I've given my heart and energy to this state as a small business owner, the mayor of Denver and as governor. I've seen what can happen when people come together with a common goal and a spirit of collaboration.

I'm not done fighting. Knowing what's at stake for our state and our country, I believe I've got the experience to tackle our challenges head on.

[**_We can win this. Today, I hope you 'll join me in this fight for a better future by making your first donation to my Senate campaign today._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-launch?refcode=em_fr_20190822_JH_20190822-fr-JH-senlaunch1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Let's do this,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-launch?refcode=em_fr_20190822_JH_20190822-fr-JH-senlaunch1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171c/691c9bd/6e94b99a/11a442cf/2893023439/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171c/691c9bd/6e94b99a/11a442cc/2893023439/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171c/691c9bd/6e94b99a/11a442cd/2893023439/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171c/691c9bd/6e94b99a/11a442ca/2893023439/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171c/691c9bd/6e94b99a/11a442cb/2893023439/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171c/691c9bd/6e94b99a/11a442c8/2893023439/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171c/691c9bd/6e94b99a/11a442cf/2893023439/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up").

name: Green New Deal Revolution
subject: 🌎 We’re in this fight to save the planet 🌎Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| **NEW POLL: The Green New Deal is seriously catching fire with the public.**

➜ 63% of national adults think the climate proposal is a good idea.

➜ 60% of registered voters support it

➜ 86% of Democrats and 64% of Independents are in favor of the plan.

Team - The Green New Deal has sparked a revolution.

Americans from all walks of life are demanding the actions outlined in the Green New Deal to combat the global climate crisis.

But not surprisingly...

➜ Only 26% of Republicans are enthusiastic about the Green New Deal.

While Trump and the GOP continue to bury their heads in the sand and deny climate change, we're moving a grassroots movement forward to save our planet and grow our economy.

But we need to know that you're still in the fight for the Green New Deal.

[_**Add your name today and show you 're in to combat climate change and pass the Green New Deal!**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dc07/693b8b0a/45c369c8/72de9c36/2160903274/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/i-support-the-green-new-deal?source=082219_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| He's going to face off against failed D.C. insider Naomi Andrews in October - **and we need to defeat her. ** That begins with you. [Can you chip into our Epping Victory Fund today?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjI4MjQ2MDc5NDEwMDE3ODU5JmM9YzduMyZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzE3ODQwMDAmZD1iMGsyZzR0.dQoYNS2BeA6LHqUXXHH0sZDDix52h7dGO4BSgOLX_4Y) Your donation will be **earmarked** for us to fulfill our special election budget - with your contribution, we'll be able to do mail, digital advertisement, and support our volunteers in the field knocking on doors. We cannot come up short on this special election. The Democrats and their 20+ out-of-state Presidential candidates are going to use Epping to organize their voters and train their volunteers. We must do the same. Michael is hitting the ground running and I want to tell him on Friday that we raised $5,000 for our **Epping Victory Fund.** I know, that if every dedicated New Hampshire Republican chipped in [with a donation of $5 or more today](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjI4MjQ2MDc5NDEwMDE3ODU5JmM9YzduMyZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzE3ODQwMDQmZD1wNmY3aTFv.DgexK7Jt94P5hZpH6-Norb5q6ZAX8w_f55KKBqUL7KY), we'd win big in Epping in October. The Democrats have shown time and time again this session that the State Legislature - and who we elect to it - matters. We have an opportunity to send a Republican to the State House and show the state momentum is on our side. [With your contribution today, we are that much closer to victory.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjI4MjQ2MDc5NDEwMDE3ODU5JmM9YzduMyZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzE3ODQwMDgmZD1pNWg0YzFm.8-aA-fZRGSi4Dd1K5ZMcrWnru6NrXluckR8KCezsQJc) Sincerely, Stephen Stepanek

clean_body: | | | | | | | Derek, Did you see the Chairman's email from yesterday? We need all hands on deck to get Michael over the finish line. Sincerely, Elliot Gault NHGOP Executive Director | | | | | | Derek, We need all hands on deck to support our nominee, Michael Vose, in the Epping Special Election. | | | | | | He's going to face off against failed D.C. insider Naomi Andrews in October - and we need to defeat her. That begins with you. Your donation will be earmarked for us to fulfill our special election budget - with your contribution, we'll be able to do mail, digital advertisement, and support our volunteers in the field knocking on doors. We cannot come up short on this special election. The Democrats and their 20+ out-of-state Presidential candidates are going to use Epping to organize their voters and train their volunteers. We must do the same. Michael is hitting the ground running and I want to tell him on Friday that we raised $5,000 for our Epping Victory Fund. I know, that if every dedicated New Hampshire Republican chipped in , we'd win big in Epping in October. The Democrats have shown time and time again this session that the State Legislature - and who we elect to it - matters. We have an opportunity to send a Republican to the State House and show the state momentum is on our side. Sincerely, Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman P.S. - the General Election is on October 8th, and it's going to be here before we know it. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street, Concord United States You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us. | | |

name: Tim
subject: date to qualify around the corner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:

We're here for the long haul, folks.

Our Democratic challengers have their big money machines and celebrity endorsements, but we have something more meaningful: a strong group of grassroots supporters determined to create a new and better way forward for our country.

The date to qualify for the debate in Houston is just around the corner, and I need you to get me there.

**[We need to reach 2% in 4 polls-- but I can only do it with your grassroots support. Chip in $3 right now to make it happen.](secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190822_1_1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=)**

When I speak with people about my plans -- to fix the economy, invest in education, and protect our health care -- it sticks with them. We have winning ideas; ideas that'll help us beat Donald Trump. But we're up against big names and big money, so **_your_** support is crucial. [**Will you contribute today?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190822_1_1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=)

Thanks team!

Tim

Peter,
When we launched this campaign, we knew that the only way we are going to beat Dan Crenshaw is if we build a grassroots campaign. We decided that we aren’t going to take a single dime of Corporate PAC money. We decided we are going to regularly host public events that are easily accessible. Now we are over three months in and our grassroots team is growing.****
Just this week we held a meet and greet in Spring Branch. Take a look for yourself. This is what grassroots looks like.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9280380/91251734/-1594214468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTRlYzYxNi0wZmM1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-fvbWy75enmtRND9CnnVD05TA9JNSbE3N5al7wz8RYI=&refcode=aug22email)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: It's time we start putting workers first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| team, for decades, incomes for most Americans have stagnated, while the costs of living have continued to rise.

Everywhere I go I hear from people who are working incredibly hard, but still can't afford a good middle-class life.

Donald Trump talks a lot about helping workers, but from his tax cuts to his reckless trade war to his continued effort to rip health care from millions, he's all empty promises. Now to make matters worse, he's scrambling as a weakening economy looms.

[That's why I'm unveiling a plan to put workers first and ensure hard work is rewarded with a living wage and good middle-class life.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac71/134673f2/ce3537e/69964389/3903689186/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/rewardhardwork/")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac71/134673f2/ce3537e/69964389/3903689186/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/rewardhardwork/")
This plan will make historic investment in American workers over the next ten years, it will strengthen workers collective bargaining power, and ensure families' financial security. [The plan has three components:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac71/134673f2/ce3537e/69964388/3903689186/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[INVEST IN WORKERS](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac71/134673f2/ce3537e/69964388/3903689186/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
The plan will make a historic $500 billion investment in American workers over the next ten years, including in high-quality training like registered apprenticeships. The plan will coordinate these investments across regional economies to connect workers' skills with local demand. It will support the 70% of Americans who do not have a four-year degree, but are seeking to gain the skills and job opportunities they need to succeed in the economy.

[EMPOWER WORKERS](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac71/134673f2/ce3537e/69964388/3903689186/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
The plan will drive economic security for middle-class Americans and people working to get into the middle class through expanding the Child Tax Credit and Earned Income Tax Credit, enacting paid family and medical leave, and raising the minimum wage. It also will empower workers by cracking down on abuses by big corporations and supporting collective bargaining.

[PREVENT AND RESPOND TO ECONOMIC EMERGENCIES](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac71/134673f2/ce3537e/69964388/3903689186/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
The plan will work to prevent recessions - which hurt people living paycheck to paycheck the most - and to respond aggressively to get the economy going again when they do occur.

It's time we put workers first. Together, we'll do just that.

I appreciate your time,

Michael
---

| Michael doesn't accept money from corporate special interests. We're building a grassroots movement that's powered by people like YOU!

[Michael's running for president to create opportunity for all Americans and build the nation our children deserve. Will you join our fight?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac71/134673f2/ce3537e/69964388/3903689186/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_082219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Meg, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: Meet my boss
body:
|
---
You've heard a lot from Team Hood over the past couple of months, but I wanted to take a step back and make sure you knew the man we get up every morning to elect as the next Governor of Mississippi: Jim Hood. He's running to put working families first, which means:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/hLYP111Z1JFwFRhXG0ARmIFzX7UbNA7L0ID9A5q9lHw=/hOXJPATggpABoa6HkBZH2WIAJ9ZGOz5pBzHoMZmGnHE=?refcode=20190821nd&amount=10)
---
[**Let 's elect Jim Hood as Governor**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hLYP111Z1JFwFRhXG0ARmIFzX7UbNA7L0ID9A5q9lHw=/hOXJPATggpABoa6HkBZH2WIAJ9ZGOz5pBzHoMZmGnHE=?refcode=20190821nd&amount=10)
Friend, you've heard a lot from Team Hood over the past couple of months, but I wanted to take a step back and make sure you knew the man we get up every morning to elect as the next Governor of Mississippi: Jim Hood. He's running to put working families first, which means:
* **Repairing** our state's infrastructure
* **Improving** our public schools
* **Expanding** access to affordable health care

...and that's just the start! Jim has big plans for our state, but when he makes a promise, he always keeps it. That's just how he's been his whole life.

Jim is a fifth-generation Mississippian and was born and raised in Chickasaw County. He's served Mississippians for 25 years as a district attorney, special assistant attorney general, and most recently as attorney general. **He 's won four statewide elections in Mississippi, and we're ready to push that number up to five!**

**Can you contribute today to Jim 's campaign for governor?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/hLYP111Z1JFwFRhXG0ARmIFzX7UbNA7L0ID9A5q9lHw=/hOXJPATggpABoa6HkBZH2WIAJ9ZGOz5pBzHoMZmGnHE=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190821nd&amount=5)**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/hLYP111Z1JFwFRhXG0ARmIFzX7UbNA7L0ID9A5q9lHw=/hOXJPATggpABoa6HkBZH2WIAJ9ZGOz5pBzHoMZmGnHE=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190821nd&amount=10)**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/hLYP111Z1JFwFRhXG0ARmIFzX7UbNA7L0ID9A5q9lHw=/hOXJPATggpABoa6HkBZH2WIAJ9ZGOz5pBzHoMZmGnHE=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190821nd&amount=25)**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/hLYP111Z1JFwFRhXG0ARmIFzX7UbNA7L0ID9A5q9lHw=/hOXJPATggpABoa6HkBZH2WIAJ9ZGOz5pBzHoMZmGnHE=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190821nd&amount=50)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/hLYP111Z1JFwFRhXG0ARmIFzX7UbNA7L0ID9A5q9lHw=/hOXJPATggpABoa6HkBZH2WIAJ9ZGOz5pBzHoMZmGnHE=?refcode=20190821nd)**
As attorney general, Jim recovered over $3 billion for Mississippi taxpayers by cracking down on corporate wrongdoers. If elected, **he 's promised to govern the same way he lives his life: with honesty and transparency**.

I talk to Jim nearly every day, and I've seen for myself how much he cares about every single person who calls Mississippi home. It doesn't matter if they vote differently than Jim, or if they have disagreements with him on policy. Jim will talk to them, listen to what they have to say, and stand up for them and their family.

Jim puts in the work to lift all of us up. That's why he'll be a fantastic governor -- for _all_ Mississippians.

[**Can you donate to help make that a reality?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hLYP111Z1JFwFRhXG0ARmIFzX7UbNA7L0ID9A5q9lHw=/hOXJPATggpABoa6HkBZH2WIAJ9ZGOz5pBzHoMZmGnHE=?refcode=20190821nd&amount=10)

Thanks for reading,
Meg

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hLYP111Z1JFwFRhXG0ARmIFzX7UbNA7L0ID9A5q9lHw=/hOXJPATggpABoa6HkBZH2WIAJ9ZGOz5pBzHoMZmGnHE=?refcode=20190821nd&amount=10)
---
|

---

Jackson MS 39236 United States

Friend,

Did you see President Trump with the Keep America Great Hat at his recent rally?

Not only will the launch of the Keep America Great Hat go down in political history, but President Trump wants YOU to own a piece of that history.

He is so excited about giving ONE lucky American Patriot the first ever designed **2020 Keep America Great Hat that he personally HAND-SIGNED.**

He noticed you hadn't entered yet, but there's still time! We're giving him the updated list of entries **TONIGHT** , and we want to make sure he sees YOUR name on it.

All you have to do is _contribute any amount_ to be entered to win the **VERY FIRST hand-signed 2020 Keep America Great Hat delivered to you by the President himself.**

name: Bettina Weiss
subject: Healthcare, healthcare, healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/hp2Eh1mpVufnmWsR3677MRGkhNKRE5hBm6rIK2Qo95s=/i1i0z-ru8a5ahlD4wu_rdnaarUR4JU0M0ahJjS-3L3E=?refcode=BLU-footer)

---
Peter,

Everywhere we go, one of the most important issues we hear about over and over again is healthcare. In many ways, it's a defining issue for this campaign. [**Very simply, Abigail believes that every person should have quality, affordable healthcare.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hp2Eh1mpVufnmWsR3677MRGkhNKRE5hBm6rIK2Qo95s=/vNfK0DwW87LcdsIKzhjE1GP-0ydnbfo-kfd_dbQoTYQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190822-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)

[_**If you agree, would you consider a contribution to our campaign? Abigail is a voice for affordable access to healthcare for all and we need her in Congress.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hp2Eh1mpVufnmWsR3677MRGkhNKRE5hBm6rIK2Qo95s=/vNfK0DwW87LcdsIKzhjE1GP-0ydnbfo-kfd_dbQoTYQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190822-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250) | | | [CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/hp2Eh1mpVufnmWsR3677MRGkhNKRE5hBm6rIK2Qo95s=/vNfK0DwW87LcdsIKzhjE1GP-0ydnbfo-kfd_dbQoTYQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190822-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)
---
Health insurance premiums for the average family are over $1,000 per month, not to mention the growing cost of prescription medications. [**When Washington Republicans undermine the ACA, healthcare costs go up. When they eliminated the individual mandate, premiums went up. We need a member of Congress who will stand up and fight for us!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hp2Eh1mpVufnmWsR3677MRGkhNKRE5hBm6rIK2Qo95s=/vNfK0DwW87LcdsIKzhjE1GP-0ydnbfo-kfd_dbQoTYQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190822-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)

Grassroots donors provide the vital support that allows us to communicate our message with voters across our large district. Abigail is making us proud every day in Congress. She's looking for real solutions and standing up for the people of Central Virginia. [_**Can I ask you to make a contribution today to help fund our campaign? >>**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hp2Eh1mpVufnmWsR3677MRGkhNKRE5hBm6rIK2Qo95s=/vNfK0DwW87LcdsIKzhjE1GP-0ydnbfo-kfd_dbQoTYQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190822-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)
| | [CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/hp2Eh1mpVufnmWsR3677MRGkhNKRE5hBm6rIK2Qo95s=/vNfK0DwW87LcdsIKzhjE1GP-0ydnbfo-kfd_dbQoTYQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190822-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)
---
Thank you,
_Bettina Weiss_

* * *

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Signs Order to Expedite Forgiving Student Loan Debt for Disabled Veterans
body:
"President Donald Trump signed a memo to automatically discharge federal student loan debt for permanently and totally disabled veterans during..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d3500f2c0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Signs Order to Expedite Forgiving Student Loan Debt for Disabled Veterans**

“President Donald Trump signed a memo to automatically discharge federal student loan debt for permanently and totally disabled veterans during his visit to Louisville Wednesday, where he addressed more than 1,000 veterans,” Chris Kenning reports for the _Courier-Journal_.

“I have taken executive action to make sure our wounded warriors are not saddled with mountains of student debt,” the President told the crowd, vowing to eliminate “every penny” of the average $30,000 of student loan debt facing roughly 25,000 disabled veterans.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14b007ad33&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “How do you stop the torrent of kids risking their lives and coming to America illegally? One key way: by finally fixing the Flores agreement, as President Trump hopes to do,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e22d720acb&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “Wednesday, Trump unveiled a plan to scrap the 20-day limit on keeping migrant kids in detention. The cap . . . set up a Catch-22: If kids can’t be held more than 20 days, and no one wants to separate them from their parents (or other adults they come with), then the only option is to release the whole family. That creates an enormous incentive for adult migrants to bring kids along, even if the journey puts them in danger.”
---
|
---
| “Vice President Mike Pence stepped up pressure on Congress to support the Trump administration’s new trade deal with Mexico and Canada, taking his pitch Wednesday to a congressional swing district in New Mexico,” Morgan Lee reports for [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45dc14c3bf&e=3ee4985eea). “We need to pass the USMCA and that’s going to open the door to a boundless future of American energy,” the Vice President said.
---
|
---
| “The number of Americans filing applications for unemployment benefits fell sharply last week, suggesting the labor market was holding firm,” Jason Lange reports for [_Reuters_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3dadc77c16&e=3ee4985eea). “Initial claims for state unemployment benefits dropped 12,000 to a seasonally adjusted 209,000 for the week ended Aug. 17, the Labor Department said on Thursday. The decline was sharper than expected.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c9c9da4b28&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=151765253a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=326d9c7b07)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Jenny Nadicksbernd
subject: Fight Back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Since former Congressman Scott Taylor officially announced he was running against Mark, this race has entered a new stage. That's why we set up the Fight Back Fund to make sure Mark has the resources
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d149/53d9897e/52deadbd/1c8e5fd8/3551540262/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fbf?refcode=20190822nd__182__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")
---
Derek,

Since former Congressman Scott Taylor officially announced he was running against Mark, this race has entered a new stage. That's why we set up the Fight Back Fund to make sure Mark has the resources he needs to win in 2020.

As finance director for Mark's campaign, I've been paying close attention to the numbers. So far 2,081 people have pitched in to our Fight Back Fund -- still short of our 2,500 donor goal. With an opponent in the race and President Trump already investing in Virginia for his re-election, we cannot afford to start falling behind this early in the campaign.

So I'm reaching out to personally ask for your help. **Will you pitch in for the first time today to help us reach 2,500 donations?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d149/53d9897e/52deadbd/1c8e5fc7/3551540262/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fbf?express_lane=true&refcode=20190822nd__182__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d149/53d9897e/52deadbd/1c8e5fc6/3551540262/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fbf?express_lane=true&refcode=20190822nd__182__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d149/53d9897e/52deadbd/1c8e5fc5/3551540262/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fbf?express_lane=true&refcode=20190822nd__182__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d149/53d9897e/52deadbd/1c8e5fc4/3551540262/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fbf?express_lane=true&refcode=20190822nd__182__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d149/53d9897e/52deadbd/1c8e5fc3/3551540262/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fbf?express_lane=true&refcode=20190822nd__182__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d149/53d9897e/52deadbd/1c8e5fc2/3551540262/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fbf?refcode=20190822d__182__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
With an opponent in the race and Trump believing Virginia is "in play" for 2020, we're going to have to invest in our grassroots campaign all the way to Election Day to re-elect Mark Warner and keep Virginia blue. **[Will you join our grassroots campaign and chip in today for the first time?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d149/53d9897e/52deadbd/1c8e5fc1/3551540262/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fbf?refcode=20190822nd__182__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you,
Jenny

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm committed to taking bold action to address the existential threat of climate change. Add your name to stand with me in this fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Last night, Jay Inslee announced that he is ending his candidacy for president. I'm grateful to him for advancing the conversation about climate change -- our country is better for it. We need to make sure that we tackle climate change with the urgency it demands. **Climate change and environmental justice have been central issues to my campaign from the start, and I am proud to be recognized as one of the top-rated candidates by Greenpeace because of it.** **[I'm committed to taking bold action to address the existential threat of climate change. Add your name to stand with me in this fight.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/environmental-justice?source=em_pet_20190822_CB_20190822-pet-CB-climatesignon-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Big solutions are needed to put our planet on the pathway to a more sustainable future. For example, in the Senate, I introduced a bill called the Climate Stewardship Act that would:
* Reduce or offset one-third of emissions from the agriculture sector
* Plant over 15 billion trees
* Invest in renewable energy for farmers
* Restore and protect over 2 million acres of coastal wetlands
* Create hundreds of thousands of good-paying jobs

Inspired by the New Deal, this proposal would dramatically step up the federal government's role in dealing with the existential threat of climate change. **[We can't wait a single minute longer for serious climate action. If you agree that our planet is worth saving, sign our petition.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/environmental-justice?source=em_pet_20190822_CB_20190822-pet-CB-climatesignon-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** As Republicans in Congress and the White House continue to deny the basic science behind climate change, I'm committed to finding real solutions that will address our planet's most pressing challenge. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190822-em3?refcode=em_pet_20190822_CB_20190822-pet-CB-climatesignon-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc089e/5fca0d19/70ffd13f/29191313/2178874851/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc089e/5fca0d19/70ffd13f/29191312/2178874851/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc089e/5fca0d19/70ffd13f/29191311/2178874851/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc089e/5fca0d19/70ffd13f/29191310/2178874851/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc089e/5fca0d19/70ffd13f/2919131f/2178874851/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc089e/5fca0d19/70ffd13f/29191313/2178874851/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4dc/18e32a7f/558d5024/7bdd5374/3385759789/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4dc/18e32a7f/558d5024/7bdd5375/3385759789/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. clean_body: | | I need you to know what just happened: \- McConnell learned he was now in danger of losing his Senate. \- So he begged his wealthy donors for cash to fix it. \- I 'm hearing they're rushing him checks up to $100,000 a-piece. If it's the last thing I do, I refuse to let McConnell's massive donors buy him another Republican Majority. So I'm launching hard-hitting anti-McConnell ads to win my race and defeat his despicable Senate. I need 25 more gifts before midnight to fund them. Can I count on your help? | | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Ben Ray | "" "" "" Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? "" We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, "" If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request. name: Kendra Cotton, Tomlinson for Senate
subject: Black women had to work through today to earn what white men made in 2018 for the same job
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9283856/91284873/-1138526639?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc0MGMyYy0xOWM1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=299QgPOn4pxIv7_Ap7V9Ei323waHMGn3YcAWRGHHtNM=&refcode=emheader_082219) | | Friend,

Today is Black Women’s Equal Pay Day, the calendar date indicating how far into 2019 we had to work to earn what men in the same job did in 2018.

Friend, we have an unbalanced civic infrastructure in America today that helps some people and hurts others. In the black community, my community, women earn $0.61 on the dollar, voters were barred from the polls last November, and mothers are three and a half times more likely to die in childbirth than white mothers.

The system is rigged against black and brown people, and it’s killing us. But there is something we can do to change it.

[**Add your name if you agree it’s past time for black women to have equal pay. We can close the gender pay gap for all women – white, black, Latinx, Native American, and Asian American – but only if we speak up and demand change together.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9283857/91284874/2009580193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc0MGMyYy0xOWM1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=299QgPOn4pxIv7_Ap7V9Ei323waHMGn3YcAWRGHHtNM=&ms=em082219B&secure.ngpvan.com/00RBQ-w2REaNre5EfdrxpA2&emci=04740c2c-19c5-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=06740c2c-19c5-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=DnszpimcQwlkpl7gZ1xfI4ZAZ9pS6mLiBYGsM5%2F3DR4p5cm%2F9itpM2gJ2E2pRN3YxcFPW4v5dcAUsZqHFdgQDSeoEgX5%2FYgDaLlEu%2BqjAa5%2B3fl5Cdyh5NLJawEndVhP&refcode2=06740c2c-19c5-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&refcode=em082219B) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9283858/91284875/2009580193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc0MGMyYy0xOWM1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=299QgPOn4pxIv7_Ap7V9Ei323waHMGn3YcAWRGHHtNM=&ms=em082219B&secure.ngpvan.com/00RBQ-w2REaNre5EfdrxpA2&emci=04740c2c-19c5-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=06740c2c-19c5-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=DnszpimcQwlkpl7gZ1xfI4ZAZ9pS6mLiBYGsM5%2F3DR4p5cm%2F9itpM2gJ2E2pRN3YxcFPW4v5dcAUsZqHFdgQDSeoEgX5%2FYgDaLlEu%2BqjAa5%2B3fl5Cdyh5NLJawEndVhP&refcode2=06740c2c-19c5-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&refcode=em082219B)
---
Right now Georgia has a senator in Washington, D.C. who is more worried about pleasing the president and his personal campaign donors than he is responding to the needs of ordinary constituents. That’s why he cut taxes for the ultrawealthy, only to see the deficit explode and create the conditions for another recession. He has tried to destroy the Affordable Care Act, which directly impacts my own family, and has even worked to expand Georgia’s abortion ban to the federal level.

David Perdue simply isn’t there to represent us. We are the people whose voices deserve to be heard. Yours. Mine. Ours.

Teresa has proven as mayor that she’s in this to lift up everyone, no matter their socioeconomic background. She is fighting to make sure that you have an equal voice in the Senate – but we need to speak as one in order to defeat David Perdue, and we need to speak now.

Thank you for being a foundational part of the campaign to flip Georgia blue and send Perdue packing. We are stronger for having you on our side.

Yours truly,

Kendra Cotton
Campaign Manager

name: Team Beto
subject: Invest in our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
We’re asking you to make your investment now so we can get the most out of your gift.
#
Will you make an early investment in our campaign?
We ask because, even though 2020 may feel far away, campaigning will become **significantly** more expensive the closer we get to the first caucuses and primaries. That’s exactly what happens every election.
In fact, our finance team did some projecting and they found that **every $1 we invest**** _now_****is equal to $4 or $5 later on**.
[Can you give $3 (or more!) today so we can build a winning campaign as early as we can?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27140?refcode=ema20190822-50479&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=50479%2E444211%2EBTK4Ap)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27140?refcode=ema20190822-50479&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=50479%2E444211%2EBTK4Ap)**
As other campaigns book up advertising inventory, it will cost more for us to get the word out. As the primaries and caucuses approach, we’ll need to grow our team in as many states as possible so we can talk to as many voters as possible. When primaries and caucuses get close, we’ll need to distribute literature that helps voters find out how to vote or caucus.
The numbers are clear: the more we build our campaign up now, the stronger we will be later on. Especially with more than 20 different candidates trying to reach the voters that we need to be reaching. Early investment will give us the resources we need to be competitive **at a fraction of the cost**.
Because we respect you and your hard-earned money, we’re asking you to make your investment _now_ so we can get the most out of your gift. **Again, every $1 you give today will be equal to $4 or $5 in January.**
[Your donation will have a much bigger impact if we get it counted today, so please contribute $3 now so we can lay the foundation for a winning campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27140?refcode=ema20190822-50479&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=50479%2E444211%2EBTK4Ap)
Thank you so much!
\- Team Beto
**[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27140?refcode=ema20190822-50479&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=50479%2E444211%2EBTK4Ap)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=50479%2E444211%2EBTK4Ap). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

Last month, Ellie and Maggie, two sisters from Cincinnati, donated just $3 and won our contest to watch Elizabeth at the second Democratic presidential primary debate. We flew them out to Detroit, covered the hotel for the night, and gave them two tickets to the second debate.

**And now _you_ could be next. We're flying out one lucky supporter and a friend to watch Elizabeth at the third Democratic primary debate in Houston on September 12 or 13.**

body:
We have one chance to send a message to the media, Republican leaders, and all the big donors on the other side that we're ready to defend Tina and Minnesota's seat.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-opponent-email?refcode=em190822lewsisin1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") BREAKING: Jason Lewis, Trump's hand-picked candidate, announces he's challenging Tina for Minnesota's Senate seat. **RAPID RESPONSE GOAL: $20,000 in 48 HOURS**

Help Tina take on the right-wing and special interest money coming her way: **[PITCH IN](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-opponent-email?refcode=em190822lewsisin1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** RAPID RESPONSE GOAL: $20,000 in 48 HOURS Friend, this is the most important moment of the campaign so far.

Former Congressman and right-wing radio star Jason Lewis has announced he's running for U.S. Senate against Tina. He is Trump's chosen candidate and will have the full backing of his wealthy donors, dark money organizations, and right-wing special interests.

We have one chance to send a message to the media, Republican leaders, and all the big Republican donors that we're ready to defend Tina and Minnesota's seat.

**We 're setting a rapid response goal of $20,000 in the next 48 hours to help Tina take on the big money and attacks coming her way. Jason Lewis will attack our health care, side with special interests and big corporations over working people, and stand with Trump at every chance he gets.

And he has a history of deeply offensive actions and votes against women, people of color, and the LGBTQ+ community. He cannot be allowed to step foot in the U.S. Senate.

**[Please rush $10 or as much as you can immediately, so we can hit our $20,000 rapid response goal.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-opponent-email?refcode=em190822lewsisin1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you for pitching in,

Team Tina

name: Team Hick
subject: The top Senate race in the country?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
It's only been a few hours since we launched this thing, and so many folks have already stepped up to say they're on board. We couldn't be more grateful. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771712/691c9bd/6eaa882f/11a443c2/3055985920/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_template")
---
| Wow, team,

It's only been a few hours since we launched this thing, and so many folks have already stepped up to say they're on board. We couldn't be more grateful.

This team knows that Hick will get things done for Colorado in the Senate and undo the damage Cory Gardner and Mitch McConnell have done.

**Here 's what we know: This is shaping up to be the top Senate race in the country.** There's not a doubt in our minds that we can win this--but the other side will stop at nothing to hold on to this seat and secure their Senate majority.

**_[We can't let that happen--we need you to make a quick donation in the first 24 hours of this campaign.](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190822_TH_20190822-fr-TH-senlaunch2-actives_actives_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")_**

Cory Gardner already has $5 million in the bank, and he'll raise millions more. We don't have to match him dollar for dollar, but we do need to raise enough so we're ready to fight back against the attacks that are headed our way.

[**_We need your help to show our strength right out of the gate: Will you chip in what you can right now to make sure we 're prepared for whatever the Washington Republicans throw at us?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190822_TH_20190822-fr-TH-senlaunch2-actives_actives_l2&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks, team. We can't do this without you.

More soon,

Team Hick [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190822_TH_20190822-fr-TH-senlaunch2-actives_actives_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771712/691c9bd/6eaa882f/11a443fe/3055985920/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771712/691c9bd/6eaa882f/11a443ff/3055985920/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771712/691c9bd/6eaa882f/11a443fc/3055985920/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771712/691c9bd/6eaa882f/11a443fd/3055985920/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771712/691c9bd/6eaa882f/11a443fa/3055985920/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771712/691c9bd/6eaa882f/11a443fb/3055985920/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Team Beshear
subject: here it comes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
This week we learned that Matt Bevin has already placed a buy for an eye-popping $3.7 million in TV and radio ads through Election Day.
|
---

| | Peter,

This week we learned that Matt Bevin has already placed a buy for an eye-popping $3.7 million in TV and radio ads through Election Day. We can expect wall-to-wall negative ads full of distortions designed to tear Kentuckians apart. It's the only playbook Matt Bevin has left after three and a half years of failure.

Here's the reality: we're going to get outspent on TV. Matt Bevin can pour in millions of his own money, and he'll have a lot of support from his wealthy out-of-state backers. But he's the most unpopular governor in the entire country. **We don 't have to match him dollar for dollar -- we just can't get drowned out. Will you donate today to help us counter his big-money onslaught?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Kamala
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
We want to share some really exciting news: **Some time today, we’re going to collect our 750,000th online contribution to Kamala’s presidential campaign.** Here’s what that means for our campaign:
* 750,000 contributions without corporate PACs or federal lobbyists;

* 750,000 contributions despite starting our campaign from scratch -- _because Kamala had never run for president before;_

* 750,000 contributions of, by, and for the people -- a powerful movement of Americans standing up for our values.

We’re running a people-powered campaign -- and we’re so proud the majority of donations come from people giving an average of $24.61. **Make a donation to Kamala’s presidential campaign and you could be the one to make our historic 750,000th online contribution:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190822?refcode=ema190822-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=6037_5755789_Ta5b_0&akid=6037%2E5755789%2ETa5b_0)

name: Grassroots @ Conole HQ
subject: under fire 🔥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| | | A Republican Super PAC is targeting Francis and we need your help to fight back.

[**Donate now to help Francis respond to these dark money attacks and then read his message below for more details.**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Donate+now+to+help+Francis+respond+to+th&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3")

\----Begin Forwarded Message----

Republicans know that our grassroots campaign to defeat John Katko and the special interests he works for is gaining momentum.

That's why one of their most well-funded super PACs has already deployed a staffer to follow me as I campaign and try to catch me in an embarrassing moment.

Dark money funded groups like America Rising will do anything to stop me from defeating their representative, John Katko. That's why I need your help.

[**We need to raise $5,500 by tomorrow at midnight to have what it takes to push back against escalating attacks from dark money Republican super PACs. Rush a donation now!**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+raise+5500+by+tomorrow+at+mid&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. My promise to never take corporate PAC money is an existential threat to Republican super PACs -- so they'll do anything to stop our grassroots momentum.

They think that they can continue to buy Congressmen like John Katko and ensure that their interests are taken care of instead of what's right for the American people.

It's up to our grassroots movement to prove them wrong.

**[Chip in now to help me fight back against increasing attacks by dark money Republican super PACs:](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+Chip+in+now+to+help+me+fight+back+agains&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3")

[go.conoleforcongress.com/superpac-attack](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=10+-+goconoleforcongresscomsuperpacattack&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3")**

Yours in service,
Francis

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1eb/388db0e9/8060f7b/609aed3b/4000549018/VEsHBA/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=11+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1eb/388db0e9/8060f7b/609aed3a/4000549018/VEsHBw/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=12+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=13+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190822_2_3")**

Cory Gardner is a Mitch McConnell puppet who votes with Trump nearly 90% of the time -- John Hickenlooper is the ONLY Democrat who stands a chance to unseat him!
The former Governor of Colorado and scientist by training achieved near universal healthcare access AND universal background checks during his tenure -- We need Hick's pragmatic, policy-based leadership in the Senate!
Gardner is VULNERABLE, but he won't be easy to beat. **John Hickenlooper is proud to refuse corporate PAC money,** but Gardner is a prolific fundraiser -- **He 's raised more than $8 million towards his re-election and Mitch McConnell will be spending TENS of millions to defend him.**
Thousands of people signed on to our petition urging Hick to run -- Now that he's in, let's show him we have his back! [**We need 463 donors to pitch in $10 before midnight to make sure Hick 's campaign gets off to a strong start in the first 48 hours >>**](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hickannouncesplit_hic?refcode=314_EM_FR_190822_HicAnnounce2_U2_X1&amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=13+-+We+need+463+donors+to+pitch+in+10+before&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190822_HicAnnounce2_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190822_HicAnnounce2_U2_X1")

Thank you,
Stand with Hickenlooper

| Stand with John Hickenlooper for Senate is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million scientists and pro-science advocates working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

We still need 463 grassroots donors to step up and give at least $10 to help Hick kick off his Senate race >> Cory Gardner is a Mitch McConnell puppet who votes with Trump nearly 90% of the time John Hickenlooper is the ONLY Democrat who stands a chance to unseat him! The former Governor of Colorado and scientist by training achieved near universal healthcare access AND universal background checks during his tenure -- We need Hick's pragmatic, policy-based leadership in the Senate! - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - "" "" We promised Hick if he entered the race, he'd have our grassroots support on day one. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Cory Gardner is a Mitch McConnell puppet who votes with Trump nearly 90% of the time -- John Hickenlooper is the ONLY Democrat who stands a chance to unseat him! The former Governor of Colorado and scientist by training achieved near universal healthcare access AND universal background checks during his tenure -- We need Hick's pragmatic, policy-based leadership in the Senate! Gardner is VULNERABLE, but he won't be easy to beat. John Hickenlooper is proud to refuse corporate PAC money, but Gardner is a prolific fundraiser -- He 's raised more than $8 million towards his re-election and Mitch McConnell will be spending TENS of millions to defend him. Thousands of people signed on to our petition urging Hick to run -- Now that he's in, let's show him we have his back! "" | | "" Thank you, Stand with Hickenlooper | "" | Stand with John Hickenlooper for Senate is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million scientists and pro-science advocates working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country. | Hello: This new poll (see below) is incredible.

The Green New Deal is catching fire with Americans, and we need to show that our momentum is unstoppable.

_**[Will you add your name and show you're still in the fight to combat climate change and pass the Green New Deal?](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dc06/693b8b0a/45d8f831/72de9c16/2158218663/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/i-support-the-green-new-deal?source=082219_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**_

* * *
**NEW POLL: The Green New Deal is seriously catching fire with the public.**

➜ 63% of national adults think the climate proposal is a good idea.

➜ 60% of registered voters support it

➜ 86% of Democrats and 64% of Independents are in favor of the plan.

Team - The Green New Deal has sparked a revolution.

Americans from all walks of life are demanding the actions outlined in the Green New Deal to combat the global climate crisis.

But not surprisingly...

➜ Only 26% of Republicans are enthusiastic about the Green New Deal.

While Trump and the GOP continue to bury their heads in the sand and deny climate change, we're moving a grassroots movement forward to save our planet and grow our economy.

But we need to know that you're still in the fight for the Green New Deal.

[_**Add your name today and show you 're in to combat climate change and pass the Green New Deal!**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dc06/693b8b0a/45d8f831/72de9c16/2158218663/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/i-support-the-green-new-deal?source=082219_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

body:

| Friend, Kamala Harris, the radical Senator from California with a socialist agenda, just announced an upcoming visit to our own Greensboro, NC. Her priorities are strikingly different from mine: **_Kamala Harris supports socialism, gun confiscation, free healthcare for illegal immigrants, abortions for all, and Hollywood values like the Green New Deal._** Meanwhile, I’m fighting for economic freedom, a strong border wall, tax cuts and spending cuts, the right to life, and for good North Carolina common sense. ** _I will never waver in my fight._** She’s coming here because the path for Democrats to the White House runs right through North Carolina, and right through our district. **[That’s why I’m assembling a team of our top conservative supporters, whom I can count on to tell Kamala Harris that we will keep North Carolina "Trump Country" in 2020.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMjI4NDMxMjc2NTEyMzg0OTIzJmM9eTJ6MCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzE4NTU3OTImZD1vN24ydzl6.oK3wMuNKZdQHjCM7lWUhad2jpe-Vrl6xewmEyRwXb6M)** [Will you join me today in telling Kamala Harris to keep her socialist agenda out of NC?](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMjI4NDMxMjc2NTEyMzg0OTIzJmM9eTJ6MCZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzE4NTU3OTQmZD1lOGo4cTh1.nuaRMxGg4JIEKQ6jyTYJA9_-qpwcfG9WvFjm7St1XiU)
