name: Andrew Yang
subject: Summer in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I spent the last few days campaigning in New Hampshire – I’ve been visiting since we launched in early 2018. I’ve had some great times in New Hampshire, but this was definitely my best visit yet.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Hello and thank you for the support! These are exciting days for the campaign.

I spent the last few days campaigning in New Hampshire -- I’ve been visiting since we launched in early 2018. I’ve had some great times in New Hampshire, but this was definitely my best visit yet.

First, the crowds were bigger than ever. Here are some pics:
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Second, we opened offices! We now have campaign offices in Nashua and Portsmouth. There is something magical about each office -- they are like small clubhouses filled with YangGang swag and enthusiasm. They made me want to get a pizza and soda and look at a campaign dashboard late at night.

Third, we had over 70 volunteers come up to canvass in the Nashua area on Saturday! That is epic. Each person gave up a Saturday to spread the word to voters in New Hampshire. Every positive conversation was worth its weight in gold -- and they had hundreds of them in one day. [We will be canvassing every weekend, so if you are anywhere in the Northeast and want to spend a day with the YangGang, signup here.](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=02dhKE93GZuRor4noAOCTgCSxYFXlibKfka1mUZfAGQHr9zuotrU-2BcLbReorRFUbM0LFK-2BNmFXE0D-2FlZOCy9s51tyiyEfAtvTvTREbImcZz6y57luhrVKAm6KAEHA-2BXNP6rWpYFMHDdtVxCnJ7mVYrGyUCSbESoHp-2F2OyotW33klW84S6bMq3-2BwKnHv1fZ5qoguFObRxIdTW4CHmZgobZZze668zrp6JjinJPl5qfEaZMb6ReDJPBhnQa-2B64JbrNRxTcbObAMGmBL1vdxzOn1kHNRKaxoelEnqrHifMJXq-2FZlDDeXxOnNkWYHizTEVj0qzqAfTM7zP1puJfYrOfcPtHCkAONh6NJS1bm9gIUifvTHXV6UwU05O2v6DnrMjMVawp2U5eAdtFq2BeNalFFsrXY-2BV1zdqePsric-2BoX5wYY-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2FHBKuO6nxUM9P53Gh1Wesj45SAASCJrRLtEprwavSpzlXWJC1gpqcVvY0v9oNESmK-2B7f35rsZH2ykdgwUPkhIWoWTtejvnsEF9gJKnTLOW0fGseDSAEKw1jJRGP24Vuf6FmP931zWqtl82fbbHK4UiGgZw5XB2gAZDRPwGECjFD0M3ilcGhvRUyzgb6XhAoqhz942Xno0dTfqX-2FoUtnkr52IUHSeUOOdz-2BSuouGYXW9KawXtZu0p5oLJE6DMkEZ-2FxLtjT6RHEXuxBbHgRw6rkcc4ozrWsTKK4h8C-2B3E-2Bjai-2FWKyDIe8htHL29aof9hfEmIyHJ9vEXhi7hEgjO-2Bveodg-3D-3D)

Last, the energy was high everywhere we went. At each event, people told me and the team that they were switching from other candidates. For some it was the last debate. For most, it was that someone they knew had put them onto the campaign. After I left, they would tell Steve or Khrystina “I now understand why everyone is talking about him.”

The latest poll has me at 4% in New Hampshire. That’s a great place to be in August. If we put in the work we can do very well in the Granite State.

Let's do the work. I will be back again this coming weekend -- excited to keep our momentum growing. If we keep this going we will make history in February.

\- Andrew
---
|
---

clean_body: I spent the last few days campaigning in New Hampshire – I’ve been visiting since we launched in early 2018. I’ve had some great times in New Hampshire, but this was definitely my best visit yet. | | | | | | Hello and thank you for the support! These are exciting days for the campaign. I spent the last few days campaigning in New Hampshire -- I’ve been visiting since we launched in early 2018. I’ve had some great times in New Hampshire, but this was definitely my best visit yet. First, the crowds were bigger than ever. Here are some pics: | | | | Second, we opened offices! We now have campaign offices in Nashua and Portsmouth. There is something magical about each office -- they are like small clubhouses filled with YangGang swag and enthusiasm. They made me want to get a pizza and soda and look at a campaign dashboard late at night. Third, we had over 70 volunteers come up to canvass in the Nashua area on Saturday! That is epic. Each person gave up a Saturday to spread the word to voters in New Hampshire. Every positive conversation was worth its weight in gold -- and they had hundreds of them in one day. Last, the energy was high everywhere we went. At each event, people told me and the team that they were switching from other candidates. For some it was the last debate. For most, it was that someone they knew had put them onto the campaign. After I left, they would tell Steve or Khrystina “I now understand why everyone is talking about him.” The latest poll has me at 4% in New Hampshire. That’s a great place to be in August. If we put in the work we can do very well in the Granite State. Let's do the work. I will be back again this coming weekend -- excited to keep our momentum growing. If we keep this going we will make history in February. \- Andrew | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. | | ****Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Team Beto
subject: Goal update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
We’re getting closer to hitting our goal, but we’re still $211,300 away and we have only 10 days left to get there.
#
Our phones have been ringing off the hook —
Less than a week ago, Beto returned to the campaign trail after taking a few weeks off to help El Paso heal.
While being off the campaign trail was the right thing to do, it did mean we spent less time fundraising. Now we have reporters calling us, asking if we’re going to be able to get our fundraising back on track to be able to compete.
**We want to tell them we are, but we need your help.** We’re getting closer to hitting our goal, but we’re still **$211,300** away and we have only **10 days** left to get there.
[Can you give $3 today so we can get things back on track? ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27156?refcode=ema20190822-50532&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=50532%2E444211%2Es83g47)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27156?refcode=ema20190822-50532&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=50532%2E444211%2Es83g47)**
Taking time off to focus on El Paso was the right thing to do. That’s just who Beto is: he always does the right thing, no matter what it costs him politically.
Plus, we were always confident that we could get things back on track. We’ve built an amazing team made up of some of the strongest, most passionate supporters out there.
With your help, we’ll come out of this stronger than ever.
[$211,300 might seem like a lot, but if each of us pitches in $3, we’ll get there in no time. Will you make your gift to help us close the gap now?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27156?refcode=ema20190822-50532&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=50532%2E444211%2Es83g47)
**[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27156?refcode=ema20190822-50532&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=50532%2E444211%2Es83g47)**
Don’t wait — the sooner we get your gift, the sooner we’ll reach our goal, and the sooner we can go back to talking to these reporters about immigration, gun safety, health care, and the issues that truly matter, rather than our FEC reports.
Thanks for everything,
\- Team Beto
**[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/27156?refcode=ema20190822-50532&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=50532%2E444211%2Es83g47)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=50532%2E444211%2Es83g47). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: The Gun Grabber agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaTurner for Senate
body:
We need more principled conservatives in Washington who can be trusted to DEFEND our God-given right to keep and bear arms -- without compromise. | | |
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend,

When it comes to gun control in Washington -- "EVERYTHING" is on the table!

"Red Flag" Gun Confiscation.
"Expanded Background Checks."
"Universal Gun Registration."
"Assault Weapons" Ban.

With the gun grabbers frothing at the mouth to ram through as much of their radical agenda as possible, the last thing we need in Washington are more weak-kneed RINOs who refuse to stand up and fight for our Second Amendment freedoms.

**We need more principled conservatives in Washington who can be trusted to DEFEND our God-given right to keep and bear arms -- without apology and without compromise.**

I am that type of conservative.

And I'm hoping I can count on you to [chip in a donation of $9, $12, $22, $45, $222, $450,$1000 or more to my campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=adad896dd2&e=6882b657f8)
---
| | | Of course, I understand most politicians talk a good game when out on the campaign trail looking for votes.

But, I don’t just talk-the-talk.

I walk-the-walk.

And I’ve got a track record in the Kansas State Senate to prove it.

During my time in the Kansas State Senate, I led the fight to pass Constitutional Carry in Kansas -- earning an A+ rating from the National Rifle Association (NRA). Not only that, but I also blocked restrictions on concealed carry at university campuses and in public buildings across the state.

Because of my pro-Second Amendment record, I’ve been endorsed by the National Association for Gun Rights (NAGR) -- the nation’s leading no-compromise gun rights organization.

**_“At a time when the 2nd Amendment is under assault by anti-gun politicians in both parties, it's refreshing to have a candidate like Jake LaTurner make protecting the right to bear arms a centerpiece of his campaign.”_**
_\- Ryan Flugaur, Senior Political Director_
_National Association for Gun Rights (NAGR)_

And if elected to the U.S. Senate, you can count on me to fight just as hard for your gun rights in Washington as I do here in Kansas.

But I can’t get to Washington without your help and support.

The Washington elites, the Democrats and the fake news media flat-out hate our conservative values.

And they’re doing everything they can to stop us.

I need your help to counter their attacks and get my pro-second amendment message out to as many Kansas voters as possible.
---

[We've made it easy for you to donate online](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=60ef0fba15&e=6882b657f8). Share this email and link with your friends and family, and spread the word that I am the Conservative fighter in this race for U.S. Senate that will hold strong on issues, including your second amendment rights!

Yours in the fight,

Jake LaTurner
Conservative for U.S. Senate

| [Donate to elect a Conservative for Kansas!](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=7879706408&e=6882b657f8 "Donate to elect a Conservative for Kansas!")
---
| | | Paid for by LaTurner for Senate
---
| _Copyright © 2019, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
P.O. Box 67237, Topeka, KS 66667, LaTurnerforSenate.com • ContractwithKansas.com

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=0732695264&e=6882b657f8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=0732695264&e=6882b657f8&c=c2cf6070cf).

body:

Did you see Tim's message, team?

We are committed to making that debate stage -- but we need a big push from you to get there.

Our Democratic challengers might have the name recognition, but we have the ideas.

We don't mind being the underdog -- because we know at the end of the day, our vision is exactly what the country needs to move forward.

[**Help us reach 2% to get to Houston and show what this underdog team is capable of.**](secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190822_2_2&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=)

> Tim

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Whose side is Daines on?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
# [](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647ec/1e3760f0/690b92e3/5f7e9062/3542635885/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1908-q3-wc")
We're fortunate to live in a country that values democracy -- trust me, I would know. But we've seen hostile attacks on our democracy from all sides. I include our broken campaign finance laws in those attacks and Mitch McConnell's refusal to secure our elections.
Senator Daines had an opportunity to move us in the right direction by voting for several election interference measures that recently went through the Senate, **and instead, he chose to block them from coming to a vote.**
[**It 's time for a Senator who listens to Montanans, especially when it comes to an issue we all agree on: democracy. We want fair, transparent and secure elections, but Senator Daines has proven he doesn't. Chip in $10 now to support fair elections.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647ec/1e3760f0/690b92e3/5f7e9063/3542635885/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1908-q3-wc?refcode=190822-wc-email&recurring=auto&amount=10")
I'm not exaggerating when I say _everything is at stake._ If we don't take action now to protect our democracy, the 2020 election could be determined not by Americans, but instead by people with outsized influence at home and possibly abroad.
Steve Daines knows this, but he also knows that his donors are the ones benefiting from the logjam, corruption and election insecurity. We need an independent voice in the Senate who wants FAIR, TRANSPARENT and SECURE elections.
[**Help me be that voice -- become a part of the movement to take our elections back. Please donate $10 or more now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647ec/1e3760f0/690b92e3/5f7e9063/3542635885/VEsF/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1908-q3-wc?refcode=190822-wc-email&recurring=auto&amount=10")
Thanks for caring about this issue,
Wilmot Collins

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624

name: Race Update via SaraGideon.com
subject: Did you see the news?
body:
"Toss-up!"
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dd5/4bef7a87/6874e3f2/287f6b60/648180046/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
When we launched, _Cook Political Report_ had our race in the "leans Republican" column.
**Less than two months later, they labeled our race a "toss up."**
This is a great sign for our campaign - Sara's message is clearly resonating with Mainers. But here's the sticking point:
**Mitch McConnell and his army of big Republican donors are reading this news, too. They'll do whatever it takes to keep this seat - including flooding Susan Collins' bank account with even more large checks. **
Control of the Senate is at stake, so they'll spend whatever it takes to stop our momentum. But we won't let them:
[**Quickly, make a $3 contribution to help us build on this momentum and elect Sara Gideon to the U.S. Senate.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dd5/4bef7a87/6874e3f2/287f6b67/648180046/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MjItYSJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august?refcode=em190822-a")
We are gaining ground because of supporters like you. If we keep this going until Election Day, we will win this race.
All our best,
\- Team Sara

name: Team Weld
subject: competition?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzWihtClgehPNuL_Z4CezRC&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190822_fr&n=1) Friend, we’ll be quick. Rumors are swirling that a couple of folks are getting ready to jump into the race to challenge Donald Trump in the primary. We welcome more competition against Donald Trump. The interest in challenging Trump confirms what we’ve known for a long time. **Donald Trump must not be re-elected.** _We didn’t get in this race because it would be easy, we got into this race because Donald Trump is destroying the Republican Party and our country._ We believe we have the experience, knowledge, and message to unite our divided country, to restore dignity to the presidency, and to bring the Republican Party back to its roots. [**Can you get us one step closer to winning the nomination and uniting our country by chipping in a $20.20 grassroots contribution today?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzWihtClgehPNuL_Z4CezRC&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190822_fr&n=2) Every dollar of every contribution goes towards critical voter outreach efforts to help us reach voters in the states we need to win if we want the nomination. Thanks for standing with us,
Team Weld | | [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzWihtClgehPNuL_Z4CezRC&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190822_fr&n=3)
